subject: [GLOBAL] Quiet a little more apt/dpkg in gitlab CI
commit_message:
[GLOBAL] Quiet a little more apt/dpkg in gitlab CI

apt-get commands are non interactive in gitlab-ci
They also call dpkg but cannot prevent it from displaying verbose output
even when the option -qq is passed.
This output has no added value here and can be sent to /dev/null

Issue-ID: OOM-1
Signed-off-by: guillaume.lambert <guillaume.lambert@orange.com>
Change-Id: If5facc5c1a8fbb004139b5107e8cf0f5dcb14404
